Freight services

The right equipment for every load

From single skids to full trailers, every shipment gets planned routing, secure handling, and honest transit times.

Full truckload (FTL)

A dedicated 53' trailer for your shipment only — direct routing, fewer touchpoints, predictable transit.

Less than truckload (LTL)

Cost-effective shared capacity — smaller shipments consolidated carefully and still moved on schedule.

Dry van freight

Enclosed trailers keep palletized goods and retail product secure and protected in every season.

Flatbed freight

Open-deck hauling for machinery, lumber, steel, and oversized loads — properly secured, strapped, and tarped for the road.

Long-haul cross-Canada

Regular lanes from BC through the Prairies to Ontario, Quebec, Atlantic Canada, and the North.

Expedited shipping

Priority dispatch and direct delivery for time-critical loads when the deadline can't wait.

Dedicated lanes

Recurring contract freight with committed capacity, consistent drivers, and steady weekly schedules.

Route network

One carrier, eleven provinces & territories

Headquartered in Abbotsford, we run east along the Trans-Canada corridor to Newfoundland and north into the territories.

Trans-Canada mainline Northern service Freight in motion

Our fleet at work

Real trucks. Real loads. Really delivered.

A look at recent SKR shipments on the road — secured, strapped, and moving across Canada.

How it works

From quote to delivered in four steps

01

Request a quote

Send your lane, freight details, and dates. We reply within one business day.

02

Book your load

Confirm the rate and pickup window. Dispatch assigns your truck and driver.

03

Track in transit

Get proactive updates from dispatch while your freight is on the road.

04

Delivered & signed

On-time delivery with proof of delivery sent straight to your inbox.

About SKR Transport

Built in the Fraser Valley, trusted across Canada

SKR Transport Ltd. is a trucking company based in Abbotsford, British Columbia — right on the Trans-Canada corridor at the gateway between the Lower Mainland and the rest of the country.

We believe freight moves best when the people moving it care about the outcome: well-maintained trucks, professional drivers, and a dispatch team that treats every shipment like it's our own. Dependable and efficient transportation solutions — your satisfaction is our top priority.
